description_long: This delivery robot features a cylindrical, weathered metal body with a domed top and a robust, industrial design. Its exterior is primarily orange and teal, with visible wear and paint chipping, suggesting frequent urban use. The robot stands on four articulated, claw-like legs, each with orange armor plating and brown mechanical joints, providing stability and mobility over uneven surfaces. The front displays a vertical array of three circular lights or sensors, and a large 'SENTRO' label, while the rear is equipped with a large, boxy compartment and two vertical antennae. Tubing, vents, and mechanical details are visible on the sides and back, indicating complex internal systems. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with clear functional elements for navigation, delivery, and communication in urban environments.
description: A rugged, cylindrical delivery robot with orange and teal weathered metal, four articulated legs, and a prominent front sensor array. It features a rear cargo compartment, antennae, and industrial detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical body, three circular front lights or sensors, 'SENTRO' label, and all four articulated legs.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlights the vertical tubing, mechanical components, and partial view of the rear cargo compartment and antennae.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large, boxy cargo compartment, two vertical antennae, and symmetrical leg arrangement.
description_view_3: Side-front view reveals the side panel with a large '8', tubing, and a partial view of the front sensor array.
attribute_brand_logo: On the front, there is a large white 'SENTRO' label next to the sensor array, and a large white '8' on the side panel. No other brand logos are visible.
attribute_sensor_array: Three circular sensors or cameras arranged vertically on the front panel, likely for navigation and obstacle detection.
attribute_wheel_configuration: No wheels are visible; the robot uses four articulated, claw-like legs for movement, each positioned at the lower corners of the body.
attribute_compartment_access_panel: A large, rectangular access panel is visible on the rear cargo compartment, with hinges and possible locking mechanisms.
